title: YouTube Metadata AI Output
description: Structured JSON output from the AI YouTube metadata prompt. Produces title, description, and tags for the daily topic video. Validated by module 08 before publishing.

title.description: YouTube video title. Engaging, factual, SEO-friendly. Must include the topic and date context. No clickbait.

description.description: YouTube video description. Should include a brief overview, timestamps if applicable, and links. Plain text, no HTML.

tags.description: YouTube tags for discoverability. Mix of broad and specific topic keywords.

category.description: YouTube category name. Defaults to 'News & Politics'.

visibility.description: Default publish visibility. Always 'public' for daily videos unless overridden.

examples.title: Bitcoin Hits $120K All-Time High | Crypto Daily Briefing Jan 15 2025
examples.description:
Bitcoin broke above $120,000 today, setting a new all-time high driven by record institutional ETF inflows and a major sovereign wealth fund disclosure.

In today's briefing:
- Bitcoin new ATH: what drove the move
- Spot ETF inflows hit $1.5B in one day
- Sovereign wealth fund discloses $2B Bitcoin position
- Tomorrow's watchpoints: FOMC minutes and $120K support

Stay informed — subscribe for daily crypto briefings.
